name: The Afterburner
description: A unique Eridian relic for vehicle use, improving afterburner performance so boosts last longer and recharge more quickly between bursts. Outside of driving it offers no combat value, but it makes long vehicle stretches much smoother.

special.description: Improves vehicle boost performance with more boost capacity, faster recharge, and less delay before recharge begins.

notes: It is awarded for completing Positive Self Image.
